drl:
rule "R0"
salience -4
when
    T0(f2 == "", f0 == -2.5, $b0_0_0 : f2, $b0_0_1 : f1)
    T0($b0_1_0 : f1, $b0_1_1 : f1)
    T0($b0_2_0 : f2)
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f0 <= -1, f0 >= -5, $b1_0_0 : f2, $b1_0_1 : f3, f3 == false)
    $p1_1 : T0($b1_1_0 : f1, $b1_1_1 : f2)
then
    insert(new T1($b1_1_0, 10));
    insert(new T1($p1_0.getF1(), $b1_1_0));
    $p1_0.setF3(true);
    $p1_0.setF1($p1_1.getF1());
    update($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
salience 3
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f1 > 3, f2 >= "beta", $b2_0_0 : f3, f3 == false)
then
    insert(new T1(-0.5, -5));
    modify($p2_0) { setF3(true), setF2("a") }
end
